title: Geo Prune - Online tool to weed out your contact list by geographic distance

messages.author: Pixelguy
messages.text: In order to "geofence" my contacts. I've (co-) built a small tool to filter users and repeaters that are too far away from me and only add to slower syncs and first byte collisions. I now enable "Auto Add" to see new repeaters and companions, then I thin out the list and disable Auto Add again for a bit. It works fine for me. Feel free to test it out or use it yourself. https://static.pixelentry.de/meshcore/geo-prune/
messages.content_html: In order to "geofence" my contacts. I've (co-) built a small tool to filter users and repeaters that are too far away from me and only add to slower syncs and first byte collisions. I now enable "Auto Add" to see new repeaters and companions, then I thin out the list and disable Auto Add again for a bit. It works fine for me. Feel free to test it out or use it yourself. https://static.pixelentry.de/meshcore/geo-prune/
messages.reactions_html:
3
1

messages.author: Pixelguy
messages.text: Added a to highlight favorite contacts on the map. Added input for lat/long values alongside clicking the map. Added eraser mode (prune contacts inside the radius instead of outside).
messages.content_html:
• Added a to highlight favorite contacts on the map.
  • Added input for lat/long values alongside clicking the map.
  • Added eraser mode (prune contacts inside the radius instead of outside).

messages.author: Pixelguy
messages.text: Allow deletion of single contacts from the list including favourites (after manual approval).
messages.content_html: • Allow deletion of single contacts from the list including favourites (after manual approval).

messages.author: Pixelguy
messages.text: Added support for pruning discovered contacts. Fix: Managing favourites via checkbox was not working.
messages.content_html:
• Added support for pruning discovered contacts.
  • Fix: Managing favourites via checkbox was not working.
